fcfRealismCheck.note: DCF +14% above SOTP base -> SOTP conservative. 83% terminal-driven; only sensitive driver is exit multiple (+/-2x = +/-$24/sh). Capex override applied (~4% of EBITDA vs 40% stage default) given fabless/asset-light model.

notes: Rebuilt as true 3-segment SOTP off 9Q recast disclosed revenue (Hyperscale/ACIE/Edge); supersedes the earlier consolidated run (base $261.7 -> $241.5). No sub-segment >90% so SOTP warranted. Segment EBITDA margins ALLOCATED (HS/ACIE 68%, Edge 35%) to reproduce consolidated 65.6% op margin; segment revenue disclosed. Value is ~98% Data Center, ~50/50 Hyperscale/ACIE; Edge is 1.9% of EV. ACIE is the single largest value driver (51.3%) on a +2x multiple premium for sovereign/enterprise optionality (judgment call, tunable). Base upside thin (+9.5%) and highly sensitive to Data Center multiple vs NVDA's current ~19.8x NTM. Cyclical caveat: 9Q spans only AI up-cycle; -46% bear is modeled, not observed.
